action.reasoning: Observation: The restored pure-PyTorch 3D model is stable and improved val_mae substantially to ~0.123, but we still have not submitted any eval despite multiple iterations. Analysis: Per workflow, we should validate the end-to-end prediction contract now and get a leaderboard signal before spending more time on optimization. The current checkpoint and predict.py were smoke-tested locally on val_3d.pt, so submission risk is low. Decision: submit the current best checkpoint for evaluation immediately without changing code, then use the returned score to guide further training if time remains.
